source_meta.notes: Environmental indicator construction is surfaced in methods outputs for manuscript specificity.
Definitions and source labels are preserved for methods reporting.
AI/AN unresolved missing persons counts from NamUs May 1, 2020 report. Total missing counts not published at state level; AI_AN_Percent_Missing and Overrepresentation_Ratio therefore not computed.

source_meta.source_org: CDC WONDER National Vital Statistics System
source_meta.notes: Age-adjusted diabetes mortality rates (ICD-10 E10-E14), 2020. AI/AN vs White comparator. States with suppressed AI/AN counts excluded.
AI/AN population share is required for compositional-confounding diagnostics.

contents._comment_naming: composite_display_name appears in tables; composite_column_name is written as the primary column. legacy_alias_column writes a duplicate column under the old name for backward compatibility with downstream scripts.
contents._comment_legacy: index_name is retained for older code paths that still reference it. Set equal to composite_column_name.
contents._comment_weighting: primary_weighting_scheme: 'configured' (manuscript original), 'equal' (recommended by review as more stable), or 'both' (write both as co-primary).
contents._comment_thresholds: Inference thresholds are now configurable (previously hardcoded to 20/10).
